title: 迷惑、かけるかも……ですけど

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Fini—hm? M-my feet! Oh no, did a shark bite me?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah, ah... Aaaahhh! T-Trainer, tell me, do I still have legs?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-they feel weird, but I'm too scared to look! They feel all slimey...
Are my feet inside the shark's mouth?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Seaweed?! Ah, you're right, it's all over me... Uurgh... I just jumped to
conclusions again...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Sorry... I caused a real scene, didn't I? Ah, b-but I think I cleared the
time you wanted me to reach... right?

We're about halfway through the academy's summer camp. Doto
might not have changed much in terms of demeanor, but her racing
skills are steadily improving.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
No, I still have a long ways to go! B-but if by some chance—some
miracle—I did improve...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Then it would definitely be thanks to your guidance! Th-thank you so
much!
choice_data_list: Nah, your perseverance is what got you results.
Nah, your perseverance is what got you results.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
What?! N-no, I-I'm telling you, I'm just stubborn... It's all thanks to
your clear instructions.
choice_data_list:
Well, you've got the skills to carry out those
instructions.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Th-that's not—I-I only do well because you're so serious about
training me!

Somehow, we've started a never-ending compliment cycle. Still, this is
a good chance for me to boost Doto's confidence, so I continue...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Aaauuugh! P-p-p-please... stop! I'm sorry!
choice_data_list: Um, there's no need to apologize.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
R-regardless, I can't take it anymore... Please... I've never been
complimented this much before... Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But... it's nice to know you believe in me so much...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I wish I could... thank you somehow...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah... I-I'll get back to running!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: M-more seaweed?! I-I'm going to slip and faaaall!

Once our training for the day is finished, Meisho Doto and I part
ways, and I make my way back to the dorms alone... Or so I think.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: OW! Urgh... Where did that... pillar come from...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eyah! Ah, y-yes! Sorry...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um... N-not really, but... maybe? I don't need anything, but... um...

Doto struggles to find the words she needs, but I know she'll get
there. I wait patiently as she gathers the courage needed to make her
request.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: U-UM!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I know this might be just a bother for you... a-and we might end up
in a huge mess because of me...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-In fact, worst-case scenario, we could get caught up in an explosion,
and the resulting shockwave would—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um... I-I want to see the fireworks! S-so...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: C-come with me... p-pleashe...

It's been several hours since I accepted Meisho Doto's unexpected
invite. We left for the fireworks shortly after, with Doto leading the
way, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: AAAAHHHHH! The fireworks are probably o-over by now...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, this is all because I got lost... And then I was almost
kidnapped by that owl…
choice_data_list: Who knew owls were so vicious?
Who knew owls were so vicious?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... But no matter what happened, you never turned back... We
just kept going, but now that we're finally here... Nothing.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I saw online that this place is perfect for viewing the fireworks... Not
a lot of people know about it, so you're guaranteed to get a good
view...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't know why I even try. I'm a walking disaster... No matter how
hard I try, things never work out right...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I really, really wanted to make you happy too...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but there's no fireworks. You did all that walking just to stare at an
empty sky...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I just ended up wasting your time again. I-I'm so—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yes?!
choice_data_list: Thanks for doing so much for me.
Thanks for doing so much for me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I... Urgh... Trainer!

Sure, we missed the fireworks, but Doto showed me how much she
cares. Just as I'm about to suggest we see the fireworks some other
time...
Boom...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hiyaaah! Ah...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: H-huh? Fireworks? I-I thought they would be over by now...

A quick search on my smartphone reveals that they were delayed due
to an unspecified setback.
choice_data_list:
Good thing we got lost. We would've missed it
otherwise.

Good thing we got lost. We would've missed it
otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-you think so? Does that mean... my clumsiness was useful?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ah, wh-what am I saying?! Of course not! I-I promise I'll be more
careful going forward! But...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... I'm glad I did all that research. ♪

As Meisho Doto looks up to the sky, the light from the fireworks
reflects in her tears, making her sparkle in turn.
Maybe... just maybe, she's gained a little confidence after today.
